scripts.fmt: bunx biome check --write axinite/src axinite/tests scripts docs package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts vitest.a11y.config.ts biome.jsonc
scripts.check:fmt: bunx biome check --formatter-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false axinite/src axinite/tests scripts docs package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts vitest.a11y.config.ts biome.jsonc
scripts.lint: bunx biome lint axinite/src axinite/tests scripts docs
scripts.lint:ftl-vars: bun run scripts/check-fluent-vars.ts && bun run scripts/check-fluent-coverage.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run lint && bun run check:types && bun run test && bun run test:a11y && bun run lint:ftl-vars && bun run semantic && bun run test:e2e
scripts.verify:full: mkdir -p tmp && bunx --bun @tailwindcss/cli --input axinite/src/styles/index.css --output tmp/tailwind.css --verbose && rm -f tmp/tailwind.css && bun run test:all && uvx --from moz-fluent-linter moz-fluent-lint axinite/public/locales/
scripts.semantic:lint: bunx biome lint axinite/src axinite/tests scripts docs && bun run lint:classlist && bun run lint:class-duplicates && uvx semgrep --config tools/semgrep-semantic.yml --include axinite/src/**/*.tsx --include axinite/tests/**/*.tsx && bunx stylelint 'axinite/src/**/*.css' --config tools/stylelint.config.cjs
